arts.ttl: Resurging Dybala Getting Closer to Roma Extension
arts.sum: Paulo Dybala has finally been healthy for a couple of weeks in a row and has been able to start in three consecutive matches, seeing full minutes in the past two. It’s the first time it has happened this season. The post Resurging Dybala Getting Closer to Roma Extension appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

Roma host Braga at the Stadio Olimpico on Thursday evening, with both sides struggling for points in the Europa League this season. The hosts have picked up six points thus far, with just one victory...

arts.ttl: Successful surgery for Edoardo Bove: Subcutaneous defibrillator Implanted
arts.sum: Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove has successfully undergone surgery to implant a subcutaneous defibrillator following a cardiac arrest he experienced during a match against Inter Milan on December 1.
